exercises.starterCode:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.

starterFiles.content:
# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.
Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM

Old contact list

Retired phone tree.

Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 1 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The repository-local author name is incorrect."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The repository-local author email is incorrect."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = '' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = 'README.md
hours.txt
old-contacts.txt
services.txt' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
actual_subjects=$(git -C "$repo" log --format=%s --reverse)
[ "$actual_subjects" = 'Start neighborhood guide' ] || fail "The commit history does not match the required project story."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/hours.txt" ] || fail "The expected file hours.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/hours.txt")" = 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM' ] || fail "The content of hours.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/old-contacts.txt" ] || fail "The expected file old-contacts.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/old-contacts.txt")" = 'Old contact list

Retired phone tree.' ] || fail "The content of old-contacts.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/services.txt" ] || fail "The expected file services.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/services.txt")" = 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry' ] || fail "The content of services.txt is not correct yet."

fixtureFiles.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -eu
rm -rf -- neighborhood-guide
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
git -C neighborhood-guide init -q -b main
git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner'
git -C neighborhood-guide config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local
find neighborhood-guide -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.
' > neighborhood-guide/README.md
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM
' > neighborhood-guide/hours.txt
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Old contact list

Retired phone tree.
' > neighborhood-guide/old-contacts.txt
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry
' > neighborhood-guide/services.txt
git -C neighborhood-guide add -A
GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C neighborhood-guide commit -q -m 'Start neighborhood guide'
find neighborhood-guide -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name .git -exec rm -rf -- {} +
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.
' > neighborhood-guide/README.md
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Help desk hours: 10 AM - 4 PM
' > neighborhood-guide/hours.txt
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Old contact list

Retired phone tree.
' > neighborhood-guide/old-contacts.txt
mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry
' > neighborhood-guide/services.txt

mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide

' > neighborhood-guide/README.md

mkdir -p -- neighborhood-guide
printf %s 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry
' > neighborhood-guide/services.txt

fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }

[ "$actual_status" = 'R  services.txt -> community-services.txt

hiddenShellCheck.script:
set -eu
repo=neighborhood-guide
fail() { printf "%s\n" "$1" >&2; exit 1; }
git -C "$repo" rev-parse --is-inside-work-tree >/dev/null 2>&1 || fail "The expected Git repository is missing."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" branch --show-current)" = main ] || fail "The repository is on the wrong branch."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" rev-list --count HEAD 2>/dev/null || printf 0)" = 3 ] || fail "The repository has the wrong number of commits."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.name)" = 'ZoeSkoul Learner' ] || fail "The repository-local author name is incorrect."
[ "$(git -C "$repo" config --local --get user.email)" = learner@zoeskoul.local ] || fail "The repository-local author email is incorrect."
actual_status=$(git -C "$repo" status --porcelain=v1 --untracked-files=all)
[ "$actual_status" = 'A  .gitignore
R  services.txt -> community-services.txt
D  old-contacts.txt' ] || fail "The staged, unstaged, or untracked state is not correct yet."
actual_tracked=$(git -C "$repo" ls-files)
[ "$actual_tracked" = '.gitignore
README.md
community-services.txt
hours.txt' ] || fail "The tracked file set is not correct yet."
actual_subjects=$(git -C "$repo" log --format=%s --reverse)
[ "$actual_subjects" = 'Start neighborhood guide
Update neighborhood services
Update help desk hours' ] || fail "The commit history does not match the required project story."
[ -f "$repo/.gitignore" ] || fail "The expected file .gitignore is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/.gitignore")" = generated/ ] || fail "The content of .gitignore is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/README.md" ] || fail "The expected file README.md is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/README.md")" = '# Neighborhood Guide

Local services and opening hours.' ] || fail "The content of README.md is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/community-services.txt" ] || fail "The expected file community-services.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/community-services.txt")" = 'Neighborhood services

Welcome desk
Food pantry
Health clinic' ] || fail "The content of community-services.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/generated/preview.txt" ] || fail "The expected file generated/preview.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/generated/preview.txt")" = 'Temporary neighborhood preview.' ] || fail "The content of generated/preview.txt is not correct yet."
[ -f "$repo/hours.txt" ] || fail "The expected file hours.txt is missing."
[ "$(cat "$repo/hours.txt")" = 'Help desk hours: 9 AM - 5 PM' ] || fail "The content of hours.txt is not correct yet."

learningGoals: Create and configure a repository from an ordinary project folder
